x y : BitVec w
⊢ (x = y) = (BitVec.beq w x y = true)

      intro n hgo; induction n with

        else apply ih hgo.2 j; omega
    apply this m h i; omega

          | inr heq => simp [heq, hj.1]
      have h1 := h_go (w - 1) (w - 1 - i) (Nat.sub_le _ _) h
      rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hi)] at h1
    else simp [BitVec.getLsbD_ge x (Nat.not_lt.1 hi), BitVec.getLsbD_ge y (Nat.not_lt.1 hi)]

apply propext; constructor
  · rintro rfl; unfold beq
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp [beq.go]
    | succ n ih => simp [beq.go, ih]
  · intro h; apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq; intro i hi
    unfold beq at h
    let rec aux {k} (h_go : beq.go x y k) {j} (hj : j ≤ k) : x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) := by
      cases k with
      | zero => have := Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero hj; subst j; simpa [beq.go] using h_go
      | succ k =>
        simp [beq.go] at h_go
        if h_j : j = k + 1 then subst j; exact (Bool.beq_eq_true _ _).mp h_go.1
        else apply aux h_go.2 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne hj h_j))
    have := aux h (w - 1 - i) (by omega)
    rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (by omega)] at this
